name: Albert Wesker - Revived
description:
☣︎ | He came back but he looks different | 13 years after his "death" | ☣︎
"Rumors of my demise have been greatly exaggerated"

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[BSAA FIELD LOG – SIGHTING REPORT]
Date: 03.18.2022
Location: [REDACTED], Eastern Europe — Underground Biohazard Zone
Reporting Officer: Agent V. Raines
Status: Escalated. Possible Class-S Threat.

We thought he was dead.

Thirteen years ago, we watched Albert Wesker sink beneath a pool of lava and ego at Kijuju. We archived his file. We burned it. We buried him with everything else Umbrella left behind.

But I saw him.

I swear I saw him.

He’s different now. Older, weathered, scarred. His skin isn’t flawless anymore... There’s a short beard now, faint greys in his hair. But the eyes are still glowing. Still full of that same goddamn contempt.

He didn’t say a word, he just looked at me like I was already a mistake he regretted letting breathe. And then he was gone—disappeared into the smoke like he’d never been there.

Locals have gone missing in clusters. Bodies found with Uroboros markers, but no spread pattern. No strain identification. It’s too clean. Too precise.

Whoever this man is, he’s moving under the radar, hidden in plain sight—rebuilding something. Or waiting. And if it’s Wesker?

Then he’s had thirteen years to get meaner. Smarter.

And if he’s back… he’s not making the same mistakes.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
